hero.badge: NEW in v0.10: runtime-enforced backend hooks · Mode system · audit-specialist merge
hero.subhead: Discipline over cleverness. Works on any model tier, compensating for weaker reasoning with external structure. v0.10 ships runtime backend — not just prompt-level convention.

features.title: Gravity Pattern
features.body: External structure replaces internal willpower. The agent stays on-mission because the framework pulls it back, not because it remembers to.

features.title: Checklists
features.body: Pre-flight and post-flight gates on every task. Runtime is the judge, not vibes. 12 default checklists ship (4 stacks × 3 lenses).

features.title: Tier-aware
features.body: Routes work by model strength. Weaker tiers get more scaffolding, stronger tiers get more autonomy.

features.title: Master Orchestrator
features.body: One planner narrows the mission and delegates to specialists. Results are synthesized with explicit confidence labels.

features.title: 🔥 Backend hooks (v0.10)
features.body: Real runtime enforcement — not just prompt convention. kasidit-route.py classifies prompts. kasidit-verify.py auto-downgrades unverified [high] claims. kasidit-record.py grows a route-memory.jsonl so the router learns the shortest successful path per mission kind over time.

features.title: 🔥 Mode system (v0.10)
features.body: /kasi off / router / lite / full / ultra. Router default loads ~20 lines, escalates only when the work needs it. Heavy commands auto-escalate; revert on mission end. Context tax drops ~60% vs. always-on framework.

how.title: Narrow the mission
how.body: Define the concrete deliverable before touching code. Ambiguity gets resolved on paper, not at runtime.

how.title: Dispatch specialists
how.body: Sub-agents handle research, code, and review in isolated contexts. Each returns structured findings, not prose.

how.title: Synthesize with confidence
how.body: The orchestrator merges outputs and flags disagreements. Only work that passes the checklist ships.

install.note: kasi-init wires 6 runtime hooks into ~/.claude/settings.json, seeds the Gravity hub, and asks one question (default mode). For manual hook install without the plugin marketplace, run plugins/kasidit/install.sh from the cloned repo.

footer.about: Kasidit is an open-source framework for disciplined AI coding. Built by Kasidit Wansudon, self-taught Thai engineer.
